description_long: This object is a rectangular electronic keyboard with a bright blue casing and a set of black and white keys arranged in a standard piano layout. The keys are evenly spaced and sit flush within the blue frame, which has a clean, angular design with no visible buttons or controls aside from the keys themselves. The keyboard appears to be compact and portable, with a low profile and a flat top surface. The blue casing is likely made of plastic, providing a lightweight yet sturdy enclosure for the internal electronics. The keys are made of a glossy plastic material, contrasting with the matte finish of the blue frame. There are no visible brand markings, cables, or additional features such as sliders or knobs.
description: A compact electronic keyboard with a blue rectangular casing and a set of black and white piano keys. The design is clean, modern, and lacks visible branding or extra controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full set of black and white keys within the blue rectangular frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the keyboard's slim profile and the depth of the blue casing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid blue back of the keyboard with no visible keys or controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the arrangement of the keys from the side.
